title: Close-up of Hands with Futuristic and Fruit-Inspired Nail Art
description: Panoramic close-up image of multiple hands showcasing nails painted in futuristic blue shades and bright fruit-inspired colors including watermelon, strawberry, lemon, and orange designs. The nails feature vibrant, glossy finishes with smooth, neutral background and balanced lighting, highlighting the detailed nail art without any logos or identifiable people.
